productDisplayName: Little Miss Intimates Women Navy Blue Brief
description: Style NoteCrafted from soft, stretchy fabric these briefs from little miss offer the utmost comfort and ultimate style. A graphic print in a bold and bright colour gives a distinct look while the dreamy soft fabric will take you through the day in ease.   Product DetailsNavy blue bikini brief, sits just below the waist, has a pure cotton panel inside, an elasticated waistband, graphic print on the front and pink dots on the back   Material and Care95% cotton 5% spandexMachine wash warmDo not bleach or tumble dryDo not iron on printFitLow riseThe model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size M
